title: Assistant Systems Manager(Window/Linux Server)
description:
Be Part of Our Success

· Design, configure, deploy, and maintain Wintel and Linux server environments.

· Conduct server hardening for both Windows and Linux systems.

· Lead and collaborate with the teams to implement and oversee server hardware, virtualization technologies, and storage solutions to ensure availability and scalability.

· Lead virtualization initiatives using industry-standard platforms such as VMware vSphere, Hyper-V, or KVM.

· Optimize virtualization environments for efficiency, performance, and resource utilization.

· Design and manage Storage Area Networks (SAN/NAS) and backup solution, ensuring data availability, integrity, and optimal performance.

· Implement and administer storage solutions, including storage provisioning, zoning, and troubleshooting.

· Implement security best practices for infrastructure components and virtualized environments.

· Ensure compliance with industry standards and regulations related to infrastructure and data storage.

· Manage and remediate the VA and PT findings and GITSIR

· Develop and maintain scripts and automation tools to optimize IT infrastructure.

· Monitor system performance, troubleshoot, and resolve issues related to the IT infrastructure.

· Design and deploy functional networks (LAN, WLAN, WAN).

· Familiar with network and backup devices (switches, routers, etc.)

· Maintain complete technical documentation.



Qualities We Value

· Knowledge in Computer Science / Information Systems / Information Technology or related field.

· Minimum of 5 years of experience in IT infrastructure engineering with a focus on Windows Server and/or Linux Server administration.

· Backup Implementation Experience with Dell EMC is a plus.

· Proven experience in designing on-prem data center architectures.

· Proficiency in configuring, managing, and troubleshooting Windows Servers and/or Linux environments.

· Solid background in network administration and architecture.

· Professional network certification (e.g. CCNP, CCDP) and cloud certification is a plus.

· Singaporean only

· Location: Ang Mo Kio



Please submit resumes to john@oaktree.com.sg with the following details in MS Word format:

- Position applying for

- Current remuneration

- Expected remuneration

- Notice period

John Goh Meng Chye

EA License No : 06C4642

EA Reg No : R1102621

OAKTREE CONSULTING

Oaktree’s services cover every industry in the job market and we have a team of dedicated and industry-focused consultants in each of our three divisions.

  1. Oaktree Technology
  2. Oaktree Engineering
  3. Oaktree Business Support 

We believe in ensuring every stage of our service process is professionally conducted and reviewing every resume submitted to ensure the candidate meet the right skills, qualifications and personality to perform to our client’s expectations.
